summary:
GEOPOLITICAL TENSIONS AND FOREIGN THREATS: Brandon states that the Supreme Leader of Iran intends to continue developing nuclear and missile technology. Brandon asserts that a significant global event is imminent and mentions potential foreign threats involving nations such as Russia and France. Brandon also describes visions of Emmanuel Macron provoking actions in Europe that could lead to World War III, involving longer-range missiles. Brandon recounts a vision of a dead dove being picked apart by a cardinal and crows, which he explicitly links to broken peace agreements, NATO, and secret negotiations in the Oval Office involving the Pope and European leaders. Brandon further describes a panda bear, representing a nation, looking into a secret box and turning its back on Putin while working with North Korea and a dragon to focus on Taiwan.

DOMESTIC POLITICS AND PUBLIC FIGURES: Brandon discusses the assassination attempt on Donald Trump, expressing his belief that the specific event was staged or political theater, though he asserts a genuine threat remains. Brandon states he saw a dark shadow influencing Trump and predicts a severe, 9/11-scale event targeting America, specifically mentioning locations like a 41st floor of a Chicago hotel, New York subways, and Washington D.C. Brandon claims there are plans for a staged coup involving the 25th Amendment and actors associated with George Soros and Antifa. Brandon also shares specific claims about media figures, stating Tucker Carlson will turn against Christians, Alex Jones will be used by God, Candace Owens will lose her mind over conspiracies, and Glenn Beck will be part of a future movement. Furthermore, Brandon recounts visions regarding King Charles and Prince George, describing them as dark figures connected to the end times.

ECONOMIC CRISIS AND INFRASTRUCTURE: Brandon predicts oil prices will reach two hundred dollars a barrel, which he claims will trigger a massive economic depression. Brandon describes future scenarios involving long lines for food and gas, banks freezing assets, and ATMs running out of money. Brandon asserts that the US dollar will fade away, replaced entirely by a digital currency system after widespread bank bankruptcies. Brandon mentions that temporary financial relief or stimulus programs, such as a new Trump IRA offering money to low-income savers, will precede this total economic collapse.

EXTRATERRESTRIAL CLAIMS AND TECHNOLOGICAL THREATS: Brandon comments on discussions regarding UFOs and secret hybrid breeding programs combining human and alien DNA. Brandon states he has seen individuals he identifies as lizard people and claims Elon Musk is a hybrid overshadowed by an external entity. Brandon describes the use of advanced electromagnetic pulse weapons that knock people unconscious without the use of traditional firearms, which he links to the Tribulation period. Brandon also asserts that a hoaxed alien invasion will be orchestrated to establish a totalitarian system and frame Christians for global disruptions.

RELIGIOUS MOVEMENTS AND INSTITUTIONAL SHIFTS: Brandon prophesies a major youth revival occurring across America and globally. Brandon claims that the Mormon church will experience a significant doctrinal correction and a church split, followed by a massive revival. Brandon states that there will be severe challenges to First Amendment rights, particularly on social media, leading up to the 2028 elections, and warns that artificial intelligence will be used to manipulate information. Brandon also mentions a personal vision concerning Erica Kirk, warning of suitors with impure motives seeking her for political or financial gain.
rawData: [May 01, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/lDyDFQRE3UY]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again today. I'm going to go over some things that we're seeing in the news. There are a lot of rumors going around about the war and where we are with an escalation of things. I thought it was interesting when I heard some things on Fox just a couple of minutes ago. Braden was catching me up on some things. This guy came back out; the Supreme Leader of Iran came out today and he is saying that Iran will never give up nuclear and missile technology. They're going to keep on keeping on like we all knew they would. They're crazy, but they're going to enrich and do things. As he stated this today, I have had a great caution. I told Diana all evening, praying in the spirit as I was doing yard work, 'I feel there's something major about to happen.' Now, I'm going to say this, and this may come across as very controversial, but I seem to stay on that kind of a line, don't I? People want to know, 'Brandon, what do you think about the assassination attempt of Donald Trump and what happened with this shooter?' In my opinion, it was fake. Do I believe that it was a legitimate assassination attempt? No, I do not. I do not mean this in any disrespect toward our president, but it might come across that way immediately. Inside of me, when I pray over this and I hear all the other prophetic voices saying there's something to this—and this might be really bad for me to say—people want to know my opinion and what I have prayed about concerning this. There's something wrong. There's something off. 'Brandon, do you feel they staged this?' In my opinion, yes. I'm just telling you there's something off. People can get mad at me all they want, but I'm never going to shy away from what I believe and what I feel in my spirit. Do I believe Trump had a hand in this? I can't say that I do. All I know is there's something not right with it. Do I believe it's political theater? Yes. I don't know who had authority or authorization to do this. I'm not going to sit there and say, 'I believe it was them or them.' I just know there's something not right. I'm not going to get on the prophet train with everybody else and say, 'I believe this is what God's saying.' No, I don't feel that. I feel like there's something wrong, and I'm just praying. I'm not trying to be a conspiracy theorist, and I don't listen to all the mainstream media and what everybody else says. There's something not right about it in my spirit, and that's all I'm going to say. You just asked my opinion, so I give it to you. Now, the other part of it is I believe there is an attempt that's real. I believe there's something major about to take place, and we need to pray for our president. There are things that I am seeing that I have not put out in public that are very serious concerning our president. The Lord has not released me to talk about that. But I'm going to tell you this: if that was staged and it was fake, there's a real something coming. There's something real that we must pray for him. I believe it's a foreign nation. I've already told you Russia. I've already told you France. There's something more to this. Do I believe that we can stop it? I'm still praying into that. I'm still praying for his protection. I'm praying, as I said, I saw a dark shadow influencing him that was on his right side, and I said 'the king.' Now, do you know how many people come out and tell me, 'Brandon, how dare you talk about the king? He's a God-fearing man.' Well, he made a portrait with him in fire, and there was red fire all around him, and he was burning. What an odd thing for a Christian to do; it's kind of interesting, don't you think? So, I don't jump on y'all's wagon just because of what you try to tell me in emails and everything. You know what? I already told you I could be wrong. I'm just human. But when I pray in the spirit, I have a caution about King Charles. I have a caution that he is part of the Antichrist. I saw him as a scorpion. I saw him as a dark figure in the end times. I saw him overcoming cancer. I saw his daughter-in-law overcoming this. And the Lord has asked me to pray for her and for George. The little boy, I said in the days ahead, will be an outspoken person that will be very dark. I saw the little boy and the Lord said, 'Pray about this.' I see these things in part. Am I trying to come against people and say things against their character? No. I just tell you what I see. And if you don't like it, you can watch somebody else. There are a lot of prophetic people that want to tell you what they think you want to hear. But I'm not here to tickle your ears. I'm not here to tell you what's politically correct or popular opinion. I tell you what I pray about and what I see in the visions that God gives me. And they're not always going to be popular. The Lord said, 'People are going to hate you,' and it's proved to be accurate. But I am not here to tell you what you want to hear. I'm here to tell you what I believe in my heart and what I've heard God tell me to tell you. There's a great shaking to awaken coming to this nation, political theater in 2026. Also, what I have heard is 1 Corinthians 5:5. There will be a lot of people that are shaken to awaken in the days ahead. I love our president. I pray for him with everything. I pray for his wife and his kids. But I told you I don't believe that there's a lot of politicians that are good. They might have good intentions, but good intentions pave the way to hell. This is just my opinion of what the Lord has showed me. Good intentions pave the way to hell. Either you're all in or you're not. There's no compromise in my heart when it comes to the things of God. Either you have your heart all sold out to Jesus, but there is no gray. It's just black and white. Either you're all in and you love Jesus Christ with all your heart, or you're on the side of the devil. When it comes to what's coming, you better be all in or you better be on the other side. There's no time to play political theater. The only person that's going to save America is the Lord Jesus Christ. It's not a president, any politician, the Senate, or the House. It's a people waking unto God and having a backbone like a crowbar, standing for what's right and praying for people that will vote and do things right. I told you the First Amendment is in trouble. I said they're going to come after the First Amendment very strong in the days ahead. And guess what they came out saying today? We see a lot of influence from foreigners telling bad things about the conspiracy of this shooting and all this stuff. And that came from foreign adversaries immediately. Then we see it's all on social media because we hear it. And look, this lady over here is parroting this and parroting that. I ain't parroting nothing. I go by what the Spirit of God is telling me inside of my spirit. It may not be popular. You probably say, 'I'm unsubscribing.' Well, bye. I'm not here to sway you to want to have to be here. If you feel God's called you to pray with me, then be here. If not, then I'll sail off into the sunset and go and pray by myself. But either way, I'm seeking Jesus with all my heart. And when we lay hands on the sick and they recover, that's what we're expecting. We want to see the Great Commission fulfilled in these last days. We're going to cast out devils, we're going to raise the dead, and we're going to see blinded eyes open. I'm not getting on the political drama and the theater of the prophetic network on YouTube and being a part of the echo. You either stand and be a voice or you're going to be an echo, echoing what everybody else says. I'm not here to echo anybody. I tell you what I hear and if I believe it's accurate, I'll tell you. I believe they're hearing God, but I believe there's a lot of false prophets on YouTube and they're echoing what they heard somebody else say. But I'm going to tell you, if it lines up with old words and things that God is saying—He's not schizophrenic. Like I said, some people get the highlights of the headline and somebody gets the detail of the story. Not everybody always is going to get everything, but we hear in part and see in part. But sometimes God gives you more of that prophetic word and somebody might just get the headlines. Does that make sense? So I just stay to myself. That's why people ask me, 'Do you listen to this prophet? Do you listen to this prophet?' No, because I don't want them influencing my visions. I don't want them influencing what the Lord is giving me. Because if you start letting those voices in, they start messing with your head. I'm not going to let it. I want to stay close to Him and stay on the vine. Stay close to Jesus in these last days. I don't want to be an echo. I want Him to be a voice through me. And if I miss it, I want to be bold about saying, 'Hey, listen. I missed it. Forgive me. We're a work in progress here.' But I'm just telling you what I feel in my spirit. What's coming about this? There's something off. I prayed over it all day long before I even said what I said. But there's something more coming. There's something darker coming. And we must pray for our president. We must pray for JD Vance. We must pray for Rubio. We must pray for the new financial people that are about to take the job in the next couple of days. I don't know if, in my opinion, this was staged or whatever. I don't know who did it, but something doesn't feel right. So there you go. People want to know. And probably I shouldn't tell you what I feel in my spirit sometimes, but I do. I'm not here to hide anything. I just tell you what I pray about. But I don't agree with Tucker Carlson and I don't agree with Candace. I don't agree with Alex Jones on some things. I believe Alex Jones—God has His hand on him and God's going to use him greatly in the days ahead, like a John the Baptist. And I see... the Lord said Tucker Carlson's heart will turn gray. It's turning gray. But in the days ahead, he will turn black towards Me and he will speak out greatly against the Christians in the days ahead. I saw his heart turning gray to black. And the Lord said, 'And I saw him standing back, but I saw Alex Jones coming forward. And I saw his heart becoming pure and pliable to the hand of the Lord.' And the Lord said, 'I will use this man in the days ahead.' I saw Candace Owens in a straight jacket. She looked as nutty as a fruit bat—nutty as a fruitcake—way out here. I saw a white rabbit going down a hole. And the Lord said, 'The conspiracies will not be so much conspiracy.' I saw her become loony because of a spirit trying to get a hold of her mind. The Lord said, 'Pray for her. I had much more for her to do.' So, I'm just telling you what I saw. But I saw others like Glenn Beck—praying for Glenn Beck because God has His hand on him. People say, 'Well, he's Mormon,' but I believe he could become radically born again. Do I agree with the Mormon faith? No. But I believe they're good people. Do I believe in the Jehovah Witness faith? No. But I believe they're good people. They're just deceived and have false doctrine. That's what I've told you a thousand times. I believe they're good people who just need some correction in their doctrine. And the Lord told me in the days ahead, 'I'm going to visit the LDS.' I'm going to visit the Mormon people and there'll be a great revival and a correction of bad doctrine. There's going to be a church split. And when this church split takes place, a great revival will happen in the LDS church. I saw the Holy Ghost and fire fall on those people. The Lord said, 'I'm going to make the wrongs right.' I saw a lot of them would. And there'll be a shaking in their church and a great move of God in their church. To the ones that are hungry and thirsty, He said, 'I will visit them.' That's what I saw. And as I have been praying over the revival this week, I am telling you, the youth are about to have a major revival. God is going to visit the youth of America and around this world. You're about to see a shaking in the youth like you've never seen before. And I believe in the days ahead He could use Erica. I saw a new husband coming up beside her. I keep seeing this young man. Do I know who he is? I wouldn't tell you if I did. Pray for her to pick the right one. There'll be many suitors in the days ahead—many pursuers. Some for fame, some for money. Not all pure intentions concerning this woman. Some people are in it for political gain, some because of who she's around, and some for finances, some to make a name for themselves. So you pray for people to find the right one because God has a plan to use people. Are you perfect? No. Is she perfect? No. Am I perfect? No. But if you have a heart—if you just give God a crack—do you realize how much the Lord can do with that? It's all hands on deck. He said, 'Brandon, I can use whoever I want to use. It doesn't mean I want them in your circle to influence you, but there'll be a loud voice, and help Me pray for them.' The way He looks at things is not the way I do. His thoughts are way higher than mine and His ways are so much bigger than my ways. I think small about things, but God is so vast. But God is looking for those that just have a yielded 'want to' and say, 'Yes, here am I, Lord. Send me.' Do they have everything always right? No. But they're just hungry. And God can take a little fire, a little spark, and turn it into a forest fire. So, you still like me? You still here tonight? Or have y'all ran away and said, 'Brandon, I hate you'? That's okay. I love y'all anyway, and I pray for you, but I will tell you what I feel in my spirit and be truthful with you. So, there you go. All right. So, anything else? Yeah. $200 oil. Where do we hear that? Not financial advice. All in my opinion, what the Lord has told me. But I saw $200 a barrel coming. And will it happen? I pray not because I saw gas lines for miles long. People waiting to get gas in certain countries and they couldn't find gas in certain gas stations. They would run out. Oil would cause it. From what I hear from Braden, he told me, Johnny Bravo and some of these others said that a $200 barrel of oil would cause a massive depression. US national debt surpassed the size of the entire United States GDP for the first time since World War II. The sky is falling. Run. It's pretty bad, huh? But people have their head in the sand. They don't see what's coming. I've tried to tell you, you'll see a stimulus come with a big old horse needle and everything's going to be looking great. And you know, the economy is great. We're having a party. I said, "You better line your pockets. There'll be a day when there'll be food lines." I saw food lines a mile long. They were lined up trying to get gas. They're trying to get food. And all the banking—in my opinion, what I've seen, what the Lord showed me—when you wake up one morning, I saw all the banks seizing all the money in the banks and they wouldn't let anybody get anything. And there were lines trying to get money out of ATMs and there was no money. I saw it and I saw the $50 bill and a $100 bill on a flag and it was waving and half of it became faded out. Do you remember that? That was one of my first visions I ever had on here. And I saw it started waving and it became digital and there were lines and they were all going into Target and they were taking the things in Target and they were giving people a little brown bag of food but people had nice clothes on. They didn't look bad. I remember looking in the line and thinking, "What is going on?" But all of it was just like it was in the stimulus and whenever they were giving out freezing credit card bills and house payments and car payments and you didn't have to pay it for a season whenever COVID was going on because people couldn't work. So they made the institutions freeze everything. That's what happened in this and I saw it. But then they came out and they made everything digital in a very strong way. That's what I saw in a vision. I remember seeing that. It was very clear. New Trump IRA. Right. Here it is. Here's stimulus. IRA. Is that right? Is that what I'm looking? That is nobody's business. Attacking. Yeah. UFOs. Okay. UFOs. What is he saying? You can't put Benny on there. They're going to be mixing the DNA. It happened before and it's happening again. I saw lizard people. I saw people that—I saw something behind Elon that made his mind smart like this and it was a cross. He was a hybrid and I told everybody, I said, "He's not all human." Like his mind's on another scale. This is different. People like Brandon, you say a lot of things. I'm telling you I saw an overshadowing of this thing on Elon. Play that. I want to hear that. All glory to Jesus. We love you, Father. We're so grateful. We'll have to watch Johnny Bravo later and see what he's doing. He probably has a lot of opinions about all this.
